purpose: Marketing/announcement post for LinkedIn introducing Synapse. Frames the problem (sequential agent loops, parallelism without coordination), describes Synapse's solution (orchestration/execution separation, master agent planning, parallel worker dispatch, live dashboard, deep planning context, circuit breaker recovery, multi-dashboard), and concludes with positioning ('developers directing agents with clarity and control'). Open-source, standalone, zero-dependency framing with hashtags.
gotchas: Marketing/external content -- not for agent behavioral instruction
Short LinkedIn-style format with hashtags at end
patterns: Problem -> obvious answer (parallelism) -> reframe as coordination problem -> Synapse's solution
Concrete capability descriptions: dispatch, dashboard, planning, recovery
conventions: Conversational/declarative tone targeted at developer audience
